summarize_worker.description: Condense page/document text handed off by the headmaster into a short summary.
summarize_worker.memory_note: ~1 GB on disk, ~2-3 GB RAM at runtime

browser_worker.description: Decide the next click/type/scroll action from the current page text.
browser_worker.memory_note: ~1 GB on disk, ~2-3 GB RAM at runtime
